_comment: Merged model defaults. rollout_mode=MANIFOLD (measured: lagrangian->manifold lifted test energy R2 0.56->0.775, val 0.75->0.96, latent R2 0.83->0.93, BENZENE +0.76; 2026-06-12). latent_dim=16: overnight E8/E9 showed k=16 sits AT the omega_Z kNN ceiling (R2~0.84) where k=8 is information-limited. PHYSICS TERMS (new, conservative small weights; ablate against the E9 baseline before claiming gains): atom_projection_weight (constant null-space conservation projector, a-priori only), keq_weight (C2H6<->C2H4+H2 equilibrium consistency - validate net-rate collapse near Keq before trusting), realizability_weight (consumption can't deplete a species within dt), transport_weight + transport_outputs=2 (mu/k DEFINE_PROPERTY heads). spectral_norm off, consistency 0.02, sigma_floor 1e-10, head_finetune 40 measured. Certification on the front-adaptive test set; gate retiring the distilled-head energy fallback on re-scoring the C rate-derived recompute against the §5 integral gate.
